patterns.theme-variant-icons: Each theme variant (cp, vp, ppm, maconomy) has its own predefined icon set and section structure. CP has 2 sections (lines 42-66), while VP, PPM, and Maconomy have 1 section each with identical icons currently. The appropriate variant is shown via CSS based on html theme class (lines 342-365). Custom sections override all theme defaults when provided.
patterns.custom-icon-support: Navigation items support two icon approaches: standard Icon component (icon: 'icon-name') or custom images (isCustom: true, customSrc: '/path/to/image.svg'). Custom images are rendered as tags (lines 179, 216, 252, 288) with class left-sidebar__custom-icon, while standard icons use the Icon component. For custom images, set both isCustom and customSrc properties.
patterns.panel-data-attributes: Items use data attributes to control ShellPanel behavior when clicked: panelTitle (defaults to label), panelIcon (defaults to item icon), panelContentId (optional content identifier), and useGradientHeader (boolean, auto-applied for Dela AI). The sidebar script (lines 369-526) reads these attributes and dynamically updates the associated ShellPanel header and content.
patterns.active-state-management: The sidebar manages two types of active states: class-based (left-sidebar__item--active) for initially active items, and data-attribute-based (data-active) for runtime panel interactions. When a panel is opened, the script clears class-based active states and sets data-active on the clicked item (lines 483-489). This prevents conflicts between static and dynamic active states.

events.name: click
events.description: Navigation item click; sidebar toggle if present

state.name: collapsed
state.description: Whether sidebar is collapsed (if toggle exists)

examples.name: CP with left sidebar
examples.description: CP layout with collapsible left sidebar

examples.name: CP minimal
examples.description: Minimal CP layout with header and floating nav only

examples.name: Standard with sidebars
examples.description: Full layout with left and right sidebars

examples.name: Standard minimal
examples.description: Minimal layout with header and footer only

examples.name: With sections
examples.description: Multiple visual blocks with gaps, each with elevation and stroke (see component JSON).
